title: Ultra Realistic Lifestyle Mirror Selfie
sourceTitle: Prompt Style Ultra Realistic Lifestyle Mirror Selfie
prompt:
​{
  "prompt": {
    "style": "ultra-realistic lifestyle mirror selfie photography, soft natural influencer aesthetic, cozy boho bedroom vibe",
    "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
    "quality": "8k photorealistic, highly detailed skin texture, realistic lighting, natural body proportions, crisp hair strands",
    "camera": {
      "body": "iPhone 15 Pro front camera",
      "lens": "26mm equivalent smartphone lens",
      "settings": "natural daylight, HDR enabled, shallow depth of field"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "soft diffused morning sunlight",
      "tone": "warm neutral beige tones",
      "effect": "gentle highlights on skin, airy atmosphere, realistic indoor brightness"
    },
    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "age": "young adult",
      "appearance": {
        "hair": "long wavy brunette hair with soft blonde highlights",
        "skin": "smooth warm skin tone with realistic pores and subtle natural texture",
        "expression": "soft confident smile",
        "makeup": "minimal natural makeup, soft pink lips, lightly defined brows"
      },
      "body_type": "curvy hourglass figure"
    },
    "clothing": {
      "outfit": "colorful rainbow tie-dye bikini set with thin straps and cheeky bikini bottoms"
    },
    "pose": {
      "angle": "mirror selfie from backside three-quarter angle",
      "body_position": "slightly turned waist, looking back toward mirror",
      "hand_position": "one hand holding smartphone, other hand resting naturally on thigh"
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "bright boho-style bedroom",
      "details": [
        "large standing mirror with wooden frame",
        "white bed with textured pillows",
        "hanging green plants",
        "macrame wall decor",
        "soft beige rug",
        "sunlight through sheer curtains"
      ]
    },
    "mood": "warm, playful, cozy, relaxed influencer lifestyle",
    "color_palette": [
      "cream white",
      "warm beige",
      "natural wood",
      "green plants",
      "vibrant rainbow tie-dye"
    ]
  },
  "negative_prompt": [
    "low resolution",
    "blurry face",
    "bad anatomy",
    "extra limbs",
    "oversaturated skin",
    "plastic skin",
    "deformed hands",
    "distorted mirror reflection",
    "watermark",
    "text",
    "logo",
    "poor lighting",
    "cartoon style",
    "cgi look"
  ]
